net.openhft.chronicle.core.io

Class TracingReferenceCounted

  • java.lang.Object
    • net.openhft.chronicle.core.io.TracingReferenceCounted
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    MonitorReferenceCounted, ReferenceCounted, ReferenceCountedTracer, ReferenceOwner

    public final class TracingReferenceCounted
extends Object
implements MonitorReferenceCounted

    • Method Detail

      • createdHere

        public StackTrace createdHere()
        Specified by:
        createdHere in interface ReferenceCountedTracer

      • reservedBy

        public boolean reservedBy(ReferenceOwner owner)
                   throws IllegalStateException
        Description copied from interface: ReferenceCounted
        Best effort check the owner has reserved it. Returns true if not sure.
        Specified by:
        reservedBy in interface ReferenceCounted
        Parameters:
        owner - to check
        Returns:
        false if the owner definitely doesn't own it.
        Throws:
        IllegalStateException

      • reserve

        public void reserve(ReferenceOwner id)
             throws IllegalStateException
        Description copied from interface: ReferenceCounted
        Reserves a resource or throws an Exception.

        Each invocation of this method increases the reference count by one.

        Specified by:
        reserve in interface ReferenceCounted
        Parameters:
        id - unique id for this reserve
        Throws:
        IllegalStateException - if the resource has already been freed. I.e. its reference counter has as some point reached zero.

      • tryReserve

        public boolean tryReserve(ReferenceOwner id)
                   throws IllegalStateException,
                          IllegalArgumentException
        Description copied from interface: ReferenceCounted
        Tries to reserve a resource and returns if the resource could be successfully reserved.

        Each invocation of this method increases the reference count by one.

        Specified by:
        tryReserve in interface ReferenceCounted
        Parameters:
        id - unique id for this reserve
        Throws:
        IllegalStateException - if the resource has already been freed. I.e. its reference counter has as some point reached zero.
        IllegalArgumentException

      • release

        public void release(ReferenceOwner id)
             throws IllegalStateException
        Description copied from interface: ReferenceCounted
        Releases a resource.

        Each invocation of this method decreases the reference count by one.

        Specified by:
        release in interface ReferenceCounted
        Parameters:
        id - unique id for the reserve to be released
        Throws:
        IllegalStateException - if the resource has already been freed. I.e. its reference counter has as some point reached zero.

      • referencesAsString

        @NotNull
public @NotNull List<String> referencesAsString()

      • releaseLast

        public void releaseLast(ReferenceOwner id)
                 throws IllegalStateException
        Description copied from interface: ReferenceCounted
        Releases a resource and checks this is the last usage.

        Each invocation of this method decreases the reference count by one.

        Specified by:
        releaseLast in interface ReferenceCounted
        Parameters:
        id - unique id for the reserve to be released
        Throws:
        IllegalStateException - if the resource has already been freed. I.e. its reference counter has as some point reached zero.

        Returns:
